vulnerabilities.title: Container runs as root user
vulnerabilities.description: The container is configured to run as the root user, which increases the attack surface and potential impact of container escapes.
vulnerabilities.suggestion: Add a non-root user and use the USER directive to switch to it before the ENTRYPOINT or CMD.

vulnerabilities.title: No HEALTHCHECK defined
vulnerabilities.description: The Dockerfile does not define a HEALTHCHECK instruction. This makes it harder for orchestrators to know when the container is ready or if it's still functioning properly.
vulnerabilities.suggestion: Add a HEALTHCHECK instruction to periodically verify the container's health.

vulnerabilities.title: Outdated base image with known vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: The base image 'node:16' has known CVEs. Consider updating to a newer, patched version.
vulnerabilities.suggestion: Update to node:20-alpine or the latest LTS version.
